title: Eva 01s roar in Rebuild 10

[]: Eva 01's roar in Rebuild 1.0(spoilers) Post by Eva 04 » Sat Jan 16, 2010 10:39 pm Okay.After watching 1.0,did anyone like the way the roar was handled when Unit 01 went berserk?It just didnt sound as good as the Japanese roar.Why did they get someone to be Unit 01's voice actor?I mean,the roar isnt totally bad but just doesnt fit the Eva.What about you guys?What are your thoughts?
